test_name: Lead list happy path — RM sees only own-scoped leads
preconditions: RM user rmA is authenticated with valid JWT
rmA owns 3 leads in stage captured/assigned/contacted
Another RM rmB owns 2 separate leads in same branch
API server running with test DB seeded via factories
test_steps: Authenticate as rmA and obtain JWT
GET /api/v1/leads with Bearer token for rmA
Assert data array length is exactly 3
Assert every item has owner_id matching rmA.user_id
Assert meta.pagination contains page:1, limit:25, total:3
Assert envelope shape: { data: [...], meta: { pagination: {...} }, error: null }
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.length === 3; all items have owner_id === rmA.user_id; meta.pagination.total === 3; error === null
postconditions: No data mutation; DB read-only; no audit row written

test_name: Lead list — PII fields masked in list response
preconditions: RM authenticated; owns 1 lead with name='Ramesh Kumar', mobile='9812345610', PAN set, GSTIN set
test_steps: Assert data[0].name_masked matches pattern (e.g. Ra***** K****)
Assert raw 'name' field is absent or undefined in JSON
Assert raw 'mobile' field is absent or undefined in JSON
Assert pan_token is not present; only pan_masked exposed
Assert gstin field is absent or masked
expected_result: name_masked present with asterisks; mobile_masked='98xxxxxx10'; no raw name/mobile/pan_token/gstin in JSON body
postconditions: No DB mutation

test_name: Lead list — cross-scope read returns empty, not forbidden
preconditions: rmA and rmB each own leads in the same branch
rmA authenticated
test_steps: Assert status 200 (scope predicate silently excludes rmB's rows)
Assert rmB's lead_codes are not present in response
expected_result: HTTP 200; data: []; total: 0; rmB's lead absent — scope predicate cannot be widened by filter param
postconditions: No data mutation; deny not audited as FORBIDDEN (200 + empty)

test_name: Lead list — role without view_lead capability gets 403
preconditions: PARTNER user authenticated with valid JWT; PARTNER has no view_lead 'O' on /leads
test_steps: Verify deny is written to audit_logs
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'; data: null; audit deny row present
postconditions: No data returned; deny audited

test_name: Lead list — no JWT returns 401
preconditions: No Authorization header provided
expected_result: HTTP 401; error.code='AUTH_REQUIRED'

test_name: Lead list — unknown filter key returns VALIDATION_ERROR
preconditions: RM authenticated
test_steps: Assert error.fields array contains entry with field referencing filter/salary
expected_result: HTTP 400; error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR'; error.fields names the bad filter key
postconditions: No data returned; no DB query with bad key executed

test_name: Lead list — pagination clamp: limit>100 clamped to 100
preconditions: HEAD user authenticated (scope A); 150 active leads in org
test_steps: Assert no VALIDATION_ERROR returned (clamp is silent)
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.length===100; meta.pagination.limit===100; not an error response
postconditions: No mutation; result capped server-side

test_name: Lead list — empty queue returns 200 with empty array
preconditions: RM authenticated; zero leads in rejected stage for this RM
test_steps: UI: assert EmptyState component renders (no crash)
expected_result: HTTP 200; data: []; meta.pagination.total: 0; UI EmptyState shown

test_name: Saved view — create happy path
preconditions: BM authenticated (view_lead=B); no saved views exist for BM
test_steps: POST /api/v1/saved-views with body {name:'My SLA Queue', filter_json:{sla_state:'breached'}, is_shared:false, scope:'O'}
GET /api/v1/saved-views as BM; assert new view appears
expected_result: HTTP 201; saved_view_id set; owner_id=BM; appears in GET /saved-views list
postconditions: saved_views row persisted; created_by and updated_by set

test_name: Saved view — RM cannot share wider than own scope
preconditions: RM authenticated (scope O)
test_steps: POST /api/v1/saved-views with {name:'Wide View', is_shared:true, scope:'A', filter_json:{}}
expected_result: HTTP 400; error.code='VALIDATION_ERROR'; error.fields[].field='scope'; no row inserted in saved_views
postconditions: No saved_view row created

test_name: Bulk action — RM denied (no bulk_action capability)
preconditions: RM authenticated; 3 in-scope leads exist
test_steps: POST bulk reassign request as RM with 3 lead_ids
Assert no audit_logs row with action='bulk_action' for RM's request
expected_result: HTTP 403; error.code='FORBIDDEN'; no mutations; no success audit row
postconditions: Lead stages/owners unchanged

test_name: Bulk action — BM reassign succeeds and is audited
preconditions: BM authenticated (bulk_action=B)
3 in-scope (branch) leads owned by RM-A exist
Target RM-B is in the same branch
test_steps: POST bulk reassign as BM: {lead_ids:[...3 ids...], to_owner_id: <rmB.user_id>, reason:'Workload balance'}
Assert audit_logs has exactly one bulk_action intent row with correlation_id
Assert leads.owner_id updated to rmB for all 3 leads
expected_result: HTTP 200; 3 leads reassigned; exactly 1 audit_logs row with action='bulk_action'; all 3 leads now have owner_id=rmB
postconditions: leads.owner_id updated; audit row immutable; outbox event published

test_name: UI — Lead list page loads and renders DataTable
preconditions: RM authenticated in browser; at least 3 leads exist in scope
test_steps: Wait for network request GET /api/v1/leads to complete
Assert page title or heading visible

expected_result: DataTable rendered with leads; mobile column masked; no raw PII in DOM

expected_result: Table shows only SLA-breached leads; pagination page=1; SLA Breached chip highlighted

ui_meta.a11y: chip buttons have aria-pressed state

test_name: UI — Mobile responsive layout at 375x667

test_steps: Assert lead list renders without horizontal scroll overflow

expected_result: Lead list renders responsively; no overflow; key data visible; filter accessible

ui_meta.a11y: touch targets >= 44x44px

test_name: UI — BulkActionBar hidden for RM, visible for BM
preconditions: Two browser sessions: one as RM, one as BM; leads exist
test_steps: As RM: navigate to /leads, select all rows via checkbox; assert BulkActionBar is NOT rendered
As BM: navigate to /leads, select all rows via checkbox; assert BulkActionBar IS rendered with reassign action
expected_result: RM: BulkActionBar absent; BM: BulkActionBar present with action buttons

ui_meta.a11y: action bar announces item count to screen readers

test_name: DI — Saved views have no orphaned owner
preconditions: saved_views table seeded with one valid and one potentially orphaned row
test_steps: Run invariant query INV-1 against the DB

test_data.setup_sql: INSERT INTO saved_views (saved_view_id, org_id, owner_id, created_by, updated_by, name, filter_json, is_shared, scope) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), :org_id, :valid_user_id, :valid_user_id, :valid_user_id, 'Test', '{}', false, 'O')
test_data.action: SELECT sv.saved_view_id FROM saved_views sv LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = sv.owner_id AND u.org_id = sv.org_id WHERE u.user_id IS NULL
test_data.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM saved_views sv LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = sv.owner_id AND u.org_id = sv.org_id WHERE u.user_id IS NULL

expected_result: Invariant query returns 0; no orphaned saved_views rows exist
postconditions: Test data cleaned up

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT valid saved_view row for an existing user
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM saved_views sv LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id=sv.owner_id AND u.org_id=sv.org_id WHERE u.user_id IS NULL -- must return 0

test_name: DI — GET /leads/:id does not mutate the leads row
preconditions: RM authenticated; lead exists with known updated_at timestamp
test_steps: Record leads.updated_at for the lead before the request
Query: SELECT updated_at FROM leads WHERE lead_id=:leadId
Assert updated_at === value recorded before the request (no mutation)
expected_result: leads.updated_at unchanged after GET; read is truly read-only

di_meta.setup_sql: SELECT updated_at FROM leads WHERE lead_id = :leadId
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE lead_id = :leadId AND updated_at > :timestampBeforeRequest -- must return 0

test_name: Pipeline board — RM moves own lead from assigned to contacted
preconditions: RM authenticated; owns lead in stage 'assigned' with version=2
StageGuardService allows assigned→contacted transition
test_steps: Query DB: stage_history has 1 new row for this transition
Query DB: event_outbox has LEAD_STAGE_CHANGED event for this lead
Query DB: audit_logs has 1 stage_transition row
expected_result: HTTP 200; stage='contacted'; version=3; all 4 writes (leads, stage_history, event_outbox, audit_logs) committed atomically
postconditions: All 4 rows committed in single transaction; notification queued post-commit

test_name: Pipeline board — guard failure blocks transition, DB unchanged
preconditions: RM authenticated; lead in stage 'documents_pending'; zero mandatory documents uploaded
StageGuardService.evaluate() will return failed_guards=['mandatory_docs_or_waiver']
test_steps: Query DB: no new stage_history row created
Query DB: no new event_outbox row created
expected_result: HTTP 400; STAGE_GUARD_FAILED with failing guard listed; DB fully unchanged (no partial writes)
postconditions: No stage_history, no outbox, no audit success row; transition rolled back

test_name: Pipeline board — terminal state handed_off returns 409 CONFLICT
preconditions: Lead in stage 'handed_off' (terminal); BM authenticated
test_steps: Query DB: no new stage_history row for this lead after the request
expected_result: HTTP 409; CONFLICT; handed_off is terminal — no transitions out; DB unchanged

test_name: Pipeline board — optimistic lock conflict (stale expectedVersion)
preconditions: Lead at version=5 after first PATCH moved it from assigned to contacted
Second request uses stale expectedVersion=4 (already incremented)
test_steps: First PATCH: {toStage:'contacted', expectedVersion:4} — succeeds, version becomes 5
Assert no second stage_history row exists
expected_result: HTTP 409; CONFLICT on second request; only first transition committed; no double-write
postconditions: Exactly 1 stage_history row for this transition cycle

test_name: Pipeline board — authz: RM cannot move another RM's lead
preconditions: RM-A authenticated; lead owned by RM-B
test_steps: PATCH /api/v1/leads/:id/stage (RM-B's lead) as RM-A with {toStage:'contacted', expectedVersion:2}
Query DB: leads.stage unchanged; no stage_history row written
expected_result: HTTP 403; FORBIDDEN; no DB writes; RM-B's lead stage unchanged

test_name: Pipeline board — reason required for rejected transition
preconditions: RM authenticated; lead in contacted stage
test_steps: Assert error.fields contains entry with field:'reason'
expected_result: HTTP 400; VALIDATION_ERROR; error.fields[].field='reason'
postconditions: No stage transition; no stage_history row

test_name: Pipeline board — skip-ahead transition blocked by guard
preconditions: Lead in captured stage; RM authenticated as owner
expected_result: HTTP 400; STAGE_GUARD_FAILED; captured→handed_off skip-ahead blocked
postconditions: No mutation; leads.stage still 'captured'

test_name: Pipeline board — board scope: RM only sees own leads in columns

test_steps: Assert all returned items have owner_id === RM-A.user_id
Assert RM-B's leads are not present
expected_result: HTTP 200; only RM-A's 3 leads returned; RM-B's leads absent from board column

test_name: Pipeline board — transaction rollback: no partial write on mid-write failure
preconditions: Mock DB to throw after leads UPDATE succeeds but before stage_history INSERT
test_steps: Trigger stage transition with mocked DB failure on stage_history INSERT
Query DB: leads.stage is still the original stage (rolled back)
Query DB: no new stage_history row exists
Query DB: no new event_outbox row exists
expected_result: No partial state; leads.stage reverted; stage_history and event_outbox have 0 new rows; full rollback
postconditions: DB in consistent pre-transition state

di_meta.setup_sql: Seed lead in 'assigned' stage with version=2
di_meta.action: PATCH /leads/:id/stage with forced DB failure on stage_history INSERT
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stage_history WHERE lead_id=:leadId AND created_at > :beforeTs -- must return 0

test_name: UI — CONFLICT toast shown when stale version detected
preconditions: Two browser tabs open for same RM user; same lead visible in both

test_name: DI — stage_history and leads.stage always agree after transition
preconditions: Multiple stage transitions performed; DB accessible
test_steps: Run INV-02 query: SELECT lead_id FROM leads JOIN LATERAL (SELECT to_stage FROM stage_history WHERE lead_id=l.lead_id ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1) sh ON true WHERE sh.to_stage <> l.stage AND l.deleted_at IS NULL

test_data.setup_sql: Seed multiple leads with multiple transitions
test_data.invariant_query: SELECT l.lead_id FROM leads l JOIN LATERAL (SELECT to_stage FROM stage_history WHERE lead_id = l.lead_id ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1) sh ON true WHERE sh.to_stage <> l.stage AND l.deleted_at IS NULL -- must return 0

expected_result: 0 rows: stage_history.to_stage always matches leads.stage for most recent transition

di_meta.setup_sql: Perform 3 stage transitions on 2 test leads
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT l.lead_id FROM leads l JOIN LATERAL (SELECT to_stage FROM stage_history WHERE lead_id=l.lead_id ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 1) sh ON true WHERE sh.to_stage <> l.stage AND l.deleted_at IS NULL

test_name: DI — Dashboard does not surface soft-deleted leads
preconditions: A lead with deleted_at set exists in the branch; BM authenticated
test_steps: Collect all lead_ids from hot_leads and sla_alerts widgets
Run invariant query: SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_id IN (:returned_lead_ids)

test_data.setup_sql: UPDATE leads SET deleted_at=NOW() WHERE lead_id=:test_lead_id
test_data.invariant_query: SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_id IN (:returned_ids) -- must return 0
test_data.cleanup: UPDATE leads SET deleted_at=NULL WHERE lead_id=:test_lead_id

expected_result: No deleted lead appears in any widget; invariant query returns 0 rows

di_meta.setup_sql: UPDATE leads SET deleted_at=NOW() WHERE lead_id=:test_lead_id
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_id IN (:returned_ids)
di_meta.cleanup: UPDATE leads SET deleted_at=NULL WHERE lead_id=:test_lead_id

test_name: Global search — RM finds own lead by partial name
preconditions: RM authenticated; owns 1 lead with applicant name 'Ravi Shankar'; no other RM's leads in scope
test_steps: Assert data.leads contains 1 item matching the lead
Assert data.partners and data.tasks present (may be empty)
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.leads contains matching lead; mobile/name masked; other entity groups present
postconditions: No DB mutation; search is read-only

test_name: Global search — query shorter than 2 chars returns VALIDATION_ERROR
preconditions: RM authenticated
expected_result: HTTP 400; VALIDATION_ERROR; fields[].field='q'; no search executed

test_name: Global search — missing q parameter returns VALIDATION_ERROR
preconditions: RM authenticated
expected_result: HTTP 400; VALIDATION_ERROR; q field required

test_name: Global search — ADMIN role forbidden (no view_lead without break-glass)
preconditions: ADMIN authenticated; no break-glass grant active
expected_result: HTTP 403; FORBIDDEN; ADMIN has no standing view_lead capability

test_name: Global search — RM cannot see another RM's lead (scope isolation)
preconditions: RM-A authenticated; lead LD-2026-000099 owned by RM-B
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.leads=[]; no FORBIDDEN; existence hidden via empty result

test_name: Global search — top-N cap: max 5 leads returned per entity type
preconditions: HEAD authenticated (scope A); 20 leads with name containing 'Kumar' in org
expected_result: HTTP 200; data.leads.length <= 5; top-N cap enforced server-side

test_name: Global search — no results returns empty grouped result (200, not 404)
preconditions: RM authenticated; no leads/partners/tasks match 'ZZNOTEXIST'
expected_result: HTTP 200; all entity groups empty; counts all 0; no 404 or error

test_name: Global search — SQL metacharacters in q do not cause SQL error
preconditions: RM authenticated
test_steps: Assert status 200 (or 400 if length/char validation rejects)
Assert data.leads contains only properly scoped results (not all leads from injection)
expected_result: HTTP 200 or 400 (valid validation response); no SQL injection; no 500; parameterised query treats input as literal
postconditions: No data exfiltration; no DB error in logs

test_name: Global search — q exactly 2 chars is valid (boundary)
preconditions: RM authenticated
test_steps: Assert search executes (results may be empty or populated)
expected_result: HTTP 200; search executes; no VALIDATION_ERROR for 2-char query

test_name: Global search — mobile always masked in results for all roles
preconditions: RM authenticated; owns lead with mobile='9812345610'
test_steps: For each item in data.leads: assert mobile field matches masked pattern (98xxxxxx10)
Assert no 10-digit raw mobile number present anywhere in response body
Assert raw 'mobile' key is absent from lead items
expected_result: All mobile fields in search results are masked; no raw 10-digit mobile in response

test_name: Global search — PARTNER sees only own partner's submitted leads
preconditions: PARTNER-A authenticated; submitted 2 leads
PARTNER-B submitted 3 leads with name 'Sharma'
PARTNER-A also has 1 lead with name 'Sharma'
test_steps: Assert data.leads.length === 1 (only PARTNER-A's lead named Sharma)
Assert all returned leads have source_attribution.partner_id === PARTNER-A.partner_id
expected_result: HTTP 200; only PARTNER-A's leads returned; PARTNER-B's leads absent

test_name: Global search — BM scope: only branch leads returned
preconditions: BM authenticated for Branch-B
Leads named 'Mehta' exist in Branch-A, Branch-B, and Branch-C
test_steps: Assert all returned leads have branch_id === Branch-B
Assert leads from Branch-A and Branch-C are absent
expected_result: HTTP 200; only Branch-B leads returned; other branches absent

test_name: UI — cmd-k / ctrl-k opens global search palette
preconditions: RM authenticated; on any page
test_steps: Assert dialog with aria-label='Global search' is visible
expected_result: Search palette opens; input focused; dialog role='dialog' with aria-label='Global search'

ui_meta.visual_assert: Dialog visible and focused
ui_meta.a11y: dialog has aria-modal=true; focus trapped inside dialog

test_name: UI — Typing <2 chars does not trigger API request
preconditions: RM authenticated; search palette open
test_steps: Assert no network request to /api/v1/search is made
Assert loading skeleton is not shown
expected_result: No API call fired for 1-char input; no loading state; palette shows no results hint

ui_meta.visual_assert: No spinner; no result rows
ui_meta.a11y: input has aria-describedby hinting minimum 2 chars

test_name: UI — Typing >= 2 chars triggers search and shows masked results
preconditions: RM authenticated; lead named 'Ravi' exists in scope
test_steps: Assert lead group is visible in palette
Assert each result row shows masked mobile (pattern with 'x' chars)
Assert no raw mobile or name appears in DOM text
expected_result: Results appear; mobile masked; no raw PII in DOM

ui_meta.visual_assert: Lead group rendered; mobile value contains 'x' characters
ui_meta.a11y: results list has role='listbox'; each item role='option'

test_name: UI — Clicking lead result navigates to Lead 360
preconditions: RM authenticated; lead LD-2026-000050 exists and matches 'Ra' search
test_steps: Click the lead result item for LD-2026-000050
expected_result: URL navigates to /leads/:id; Lead 360 renders; search palette closes

ui_meta.visual_assert: URL contains /leads/; lead_code visible on page
ui_meta.a11y: result items are links or have role='option' with activation on Enter

test_name: UI — Empty state shown when no results found
preconditions: RM authenticated; no leads/partners/tasks match 'ZZNOTEXIST99'
test_steps: Assert EmptyState component is visible in palette
Assert result groups are not rendered
Assert no error state or crash
expected_result: EmptyState visible; no result groups; no error; palette remains open

ui_meta.visual_assert: EmptyState visible; no lead/partner/task rows
ui_meta.a11y: EmptyState has role='status' or is announced via aria-live

test_name: UI — Escape key closes search palette
preconditions: RM authenticated; search palette open
test_steps: Assert dialog is closed (not visible in DOM or aria-hidden=true)
Assert focus returns to the element that triggered the palette (search trigger button)
expected_result: Dialog closes on Escape; focus returns to trigger; no lingering overlay

ui_meta.visual_assert: Dialog not visible; focus on trigger button
ui_meta.a11y: Escape closes modal per ARIA dialog pattern; focus restored to trigger

test_name: UI — Arrow key navigation selects results; Enter navigates
preconditions: RM authenticated; search 'Ra' returns at least 3 results
test_steps: Assert third result item has aria-selected=true or visual focus
Assert navigation fires to that result's destination URL
expected_result: ArrowDown selects 3rd item; Enter navigates; keyboard-only operation works

ui_meta.visual_assert: Third item has focus indicator; navigation fires on Enter
ui_meta.a11y: aria-activedescendant tracks current item; listbox role on results container

test_name: UI — Mobile search accessible via bottom nav at 390x844
preconditions: RM authenticated; mobile viewport
test_steps: Tap the Search icon in bottom navigation
Type 'Ra' and assert results appear above touch keyboard area
expected_result: Search palette opens on mobile; input focused; results visible without being blocked by keyboard

ui_meta.visual_assert: Search palette visible; results not obscured by virtual keyboard
ui_meta.a11y: touch targets >=44px; bottom nav search icon has aria-label

test_name: DI — Search endpoint never writes to any table
preconditions: RM authenticated; audit_logs row count recorded before search
test_steps: Record COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs at T0
Record COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs at T1
Assert T1 === T0 (search wrote no audit rows)
expected_result: audit_logs count unchanged; search is read-only; no writes to any table

di_meta.setup_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE created_at > :before_ts
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_logs WHERE created_at > :before_search_ts -- must return 0

test_name: DI — No deleted lead returned by search
preconditions: Lead 'Ravi Deleted' exists with deleted_at set (soft-deleted)
RM authenticated
test_steps: Run: SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_id IN (:returned_ids)
expected_result: Deleted lead absent from search results; invariant query returns 0

di_meta.setup_sql: INSERT lead with deleted_at=NOW() and applicant_name containing 'Ravi'
di_meta.invariant_query: SELECT lead_id FROM leads WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND lead_id IN (:returned_ids) -- must return 0
